description: Rental apartment listings extracted from a classifieds page, enriched with details from each listing page.

items.description: Apartment rental listings found on the page.
A single rental apartment listing with list-page and detail-page data.

title.description: Listing title as shown on the classifieds page.

monthlyPrice.description: The stated monthly rental price, preserving currency and formatting from the page.

postedDate.description: The posting date as shown on the page.

address.description: The stated apartment address or location text.

link.description: Absolute URL to the full listing page.

images.description: All apartment image URLs from the full listing page.

fullDescription.description: Full apartment description from the listing detail page.

offerType.description: Type of offer stated on the detail page: agent or owner.

contactPhone.description: Stated contact phone number from the full listing page.

detailStatus.description: HTTP status captured while loading the listing detail page.

detailOk.description: Whether the detail page was reachable.

detailError.description: Detail-page error code when the listing detail page could not be loaded.

schema.description: List-page extraction of rental apartment cards before detail-page enrichment.

title.description: Listing title from the list page.

monthlyPrice.description: Monthly rental price exactly as stated on the list page.

postedDate.description: Posting date exactly as stated on the list page.

address.description: Address or location exactly as stated on the list page.

link.description: Absolute URL to the listing detail page.

schema.description: Detail-page enrichment merged into the corresponding listing item.

images.description: All image URLs from the full listing page.

fullDescription.description: Full apartment description from the detail page.

offerType.description: Whether the offer is from an agent or owner.

contactPhone.description: Stated contact phone number from the detail page.
